title: Homepage Section Restructure
objective: Update the ATLAS homepage to remove the motivation and differentiation sections, and add schedule, submissions, and contact sections while keeping the page single-page and consistent with current site structure.
instructions: Edit index.html to remove the sections titled 'Why This Workshop, and Why Now?' and 'What Makes This Different'.
Add new in-page sections for Schedule, Submissions, and Contact with concise placeholder copy that does not invent unconfirmed logistics or links.
Update the in-page navigation so it points to the surviving and newly added sections.
Make any minimal CSS adjustments in assets/main.css only if needed to keep the new sections rendering cleanly.
constraints: Do not redesign the site beyond the requested section and navigation changes.
Do not invent confirmed dates, submission URLs, or contact details.
expected_outputs: Updated homepage HTML, and CSS only if necessary.
ResultPacket listing changed files and whether docs should be updated.
definition_of_done: Homepage no longer includes the two removed sections and includes Schedule, Submissions, and Contact sections with working anchor navigation.
